token_theft.description: Dangling markup injection to steal CSRF tokens and secrets -- inject unclosed HTML tags that capture page content up to the next matching quote/delimiter

probes.description: Dangling img src with open quote -- unclosed quote captures all page content until next single quote (CSRF tokens, API keys) and sends to Collaborator
Dangling img src with double quote -- captures content until next double quote in page source
Dangling anchor tag -- captures subsequent page content as URL parameters when user clicks any link
Dangling base tag -- redirects all relative URLs on page to attacker server, capturing form submissions and resource loads

csp_bypass_dangling.description: Dangling markup under CSP -- steal data without script execution by using non-script HTML elements to exfiltrate content

probes.description: Dangling meta refresh -- redirect with open URL captures page content as query string, bypasses script-src CSP
Dangling form injection -- captures input values when user submits, works under strict CSP
